principle: 指挥官每轮优先选择未完成且依赖已满足的最高优先级任务；先数据生命体，再训练掌握，再前端沉浸，再质量门禁。

Mistakes reads resource_id from the URL query and displays a resource context card with title, mistake pattern, expression goal, scene/category, quality/difficulty, and usage guidance
Mistakes uses the resource mistake pattern, expression goal, scene, category, and title as focus terms for prioritizing related mistake cards without hiding all history when no match exists
resource context actions link back to ResourceDetail, carry the same resource into Trainer, and clear only resource_id while preserving search query state
world-class smoke covers the resource-to-mistake context flow on desktop and mobile
verification: cd frontend && npm run smoke:world => passed, checked=42, report=frontend/output/smoke/report.json

modules.name: 资源上下文统一 Query 契约
acceptance: frontend has a shared composable for reading resource_id from route query, loading resource details, reporting errors, and clearing only resource_id while preserving other query parameters
Trainer and Mistakes use the shared resource context composable instead of duplicating query parsing and clear behavior
resource-to-trainer and resource-to-mistake smoke interactions keep passing after the refactor
frontend type-check/build and world-class smoke pass
verification: cd frontend && npm run smoke:world => passed, checked=42, report=frontend/output/smoke/report.json

modules.name: 设置页真实数据导出闭环
acceptance: Settings data export button generates a real JSON export artifact instead of only showing a toast
export payload includes manifest, profile, preferences, data stats, training summaries, radar, mistakes, due reviews, and local runtime flags
settings page displays export filename, size, record count, generated time, checksum, coverage summary, and a reusable save-file link
world-class smoke covers Settings route and export interaction on desktop and mobile
real browser verification confirms the export panel, blob download link, checksum, and no horizontal overflow
verification: cd frontend && npm run smoke:world => passed, checked=46, report=frontend/output/smoke/report.json
In-app browser verification: /settings data export shows 导出包已生成, blob save link, checksum, coverage summary, horizontalOverflow=0

modules.name: 表达工具箱搜索建议与引导闭环
acceptance: Expression toolbox search input exposes database-aware and stable fallback suggestions through a datalist while preserving manual typing
Search guidance groups suggestions by tool, scene, goal, formula, category, and boundary so users know what to query
Expression tools API q search covers name, id, layer, category, description, formula, scenes, fit metadata, micro steps, risk flags, and examples
Clicking a suggested search term filters tools and shows a current-search state with clear action
world-class smoke and real browser verification cover the search suggestion interaction
verification: cd frontend && npm run smoke:world => passed, checked=48, report=frontend/output/smoke/report.json
In-app browser verification: /expression has input[list=expression-search-suggestions], 46 datalist options, 情绪标注/PREP模型 suggestions, grouped guidance, and no missing search hints

modules.name: 多记录页目录折叠释放布局空间
acceptance: PageTocSidebar emits collapsed state so parent pages can reclaim the right sidebar column instead of leaving blank space
Resources, ResourceSurf, and ResourceDetail switch to a full-width content grid when the TOC is collapsed
Collapsed TOC control is fixed near the right edge of the viewport and can reopen the directory
Expression keeps its right-side business panel while moving only the collapsed TOC control to the right edge
world-class smoke covers TOC collapse layout on multi-record pages
verification: cd frontend && npm run smoke:world => passed, checked=51, report=frontend/output/smoke/report.json
In-app browser verification: /resources before=973px 280px after=1277px single column, expand button right offset ~25px, overflow=0
In-app browser verification: /surf and /resources/1 also release the 280px TOC column with overflow=0
In-app browser verification: /expression collapsed TOC button fixes to the right edge while 工具链推荐 remains visible

modules.name: 设置页 Markdown 可读导出与保存位置提示
acceptance: Settings export generates a readable Markdown file instead of a JSON-only artifact
Markdown export includes summary tables, profile, preferences, training summaries, mistakes, due reviews, and raw audit JSON
Export panel clearly distinguishes choosing a save location from downloading to the browser default download directory
Export action no longer auto-opens the native save picker; the picker opens only through the explicit choose-location action
world-class smoke verifies .md filename, Markdown actions, location hint, blob fallback download, coverage summary, and no horizontal overflow
verification: cd frontend && npm run smoke:world => passed, checked=51, report=frontend/output/smoke/report.json
SettingsExport smoke: Markdown 导出已生成, relationship-training-export-2026-05-23.md, 选择位置保存, 下载到默认目录, blob download href, coverage summary

modules.name: 设置页每日提醒真实本地通知
acceptance: Daily reminder time is not presented as a fake setting; the app schedules a browser local notification when permission is granted
Saving preferences requests notification permission when needed and reschedules the next reminder
Settings explains that reminders require browser notification permission and an open page/browser, and are not phone background push notifications
A test reminder action exists so users can verify whether notifications work on their device
world-class smoke covers the reminder controls and capability boundary copy
verification: cd frontend && npm run smoke:world => passed, checked=53, report=frontend/output/smoke/report.json
SettingsReminder smoke: reminder section, 20:00 default value, 测试提醒 button, browser permission boundary, not phone background push copy

modules.name: 我的档案真实训练证据联动
acceptance: Profile page removes hardcoded skill percentages, fake training totals, fake streaks, and static awareness copy
Basic profile fields come from /api/profile and unknown fields display pending states instead of fabricated defaults
Skill curves read /api/training/radar and show zero/untrained state when no attempts exist
Learning stats only use currently provable API metrics: today, week, active days, average score, mistakes, due reviews, sample capacity, and radar total
Profile page includes a calculation evidence section explaining API sources and metric boundaries
world-class smoke covers /profile and guards against regression to old hardcoded values
verification: cd frontend && npm run smoke:world => passed, checked=57, report=frontend/output/smoke/report.json
In-app browser verification: /profile has 计算依据, /api/profile, /api/training/radar, real-stat labels, overflow=0, and no old static awareness copy or 156 fake metric

modules.name: 表达工具箱与八阶路径学习脚手架升级
acceptance: Expression search is reorganized into one primary search, structured filters, grouped suggestion chips, and visible active filters
Expression tool-chain recommendations are moved out of the right sidebar into a horizontal recommendation band below search
Expression right sidebar contains only the tool directory so collapsing it can reclaim layout width
Expanded expression tool cards explain definition, principle, formula, method, scenes, risk boundary, before/after examples, and transfer drill
Path page explains the curriculum route with concepts, principles, methods, scenes, pitfalls, bad/good examples, and drills for each stage
world-class smoke covers expression learning details and path learning scaffold
verification: cd frontend && npm run smoke:world => passed, checked=59, report=frontend/output/smoke/report.json
ExpressionSearchSuggestions smoke: 检索与筛选, grouped suggestions, tool-chain recommendation band, active filters, expanded detail learning scaffold
PathLearningScaffold smoke: route overview, stage concept/principle/method/scene/pitfall/examples/drill, no horizontal overflow

modules.name: 资源海洋学习拆解卡升级
acceptance: Resource list cards include a learning scaffold with concept, principle, method, and drill sections
Resource cards extract low-quality and better-response examples from structured content when available
Resource detail page includes a dedicated learning breakdown section
Resource detail explains source boundaries and does not present summaries as external full text
Existing training and mistake rewrite entry points remain available
world-class smoke covers resource list and detail learning scaffold
verification: cd frontend && npm run smoke:world => passed, checked=61, report=frontend/output/smoke/report.json
ResourceLearningScaffold smoke: /resources list has 学习拆解, 概念定义, 核心原则, 实践方法, 练习任务, 低质量回应, 更好回应, source boundary
ResourceLearningScaffold smoke: /resources/1 detail has 学习拆解, examples, drills, and no full-text/source-boundary ambiguity
